args.content:
# Hawaii Vacation Packing List

## Clothing
- Swimwear (2-3 sets)
- Beach cover-ups
- Flip-flops/sandals
- Casual outfits (t-shirts, shorts)
- Light sweater or jacket (for cooler evenings)
- Sleepwear
- Underwear and socks
- Hat/cap for sun protection
- Sunglasses

## Beach & Outdoor Gear
- Sunscreen (reef-safe)
- After-sun lotion (aloe vera)
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins)
- Beach towel
- Reusable water bottle
- Waterproof phone case
- Hiking shoes (for Diamond Head trail)
- Day backpack

## Electronics
- Camera with extra memory cards
- Phone and charger
- Portable power bank
- Travel adapter (if needed)

## Toiletries
- Toothbrush and toothpaste
- Shampoo and conditioner
- Body wash
- Deodorant
- Razor and shaving cream
- Makeup and makeup remover
- Hairbrush/comb
- Hair styling products
- Feminine hygiene products
- Prescription medications
- First aid kit (band-aids, pain relievers, motion sickness pills)

## Documents & Money
- Passport (if required)
- Driver's license
- Flight tickets/boarding passes
- Hotel reservation details
- Travel insurance documents
- Credit cards and cash (some US dollars)
- Emergency contact information

## Activities-Specific Items
- Hiking gear (light backpack, water bottle, trail snacks)
- Kayaking gear (if not provided by tour)
- Camera accessories (extra batteries, tripod)
- Guidebook or downloaded maps

## Miscellaneous
- Books or e-reader for relaxation
- Travel journal
- Snacks for the flight
- Earplugs and eye mask (for flights/hotel)
- Laundry bag
- Small umbrella or rain jacket (just in case)

Have a wonderful vacation in Hawaii!
